title: Fix student registration, add WhatsApp CTA on course sections, and apply Rajat's Equation logo as brand language

requirements.text: Fix the student registration flow so that every new student who submits the /register form is correctly persisted. The registerStudent function must create both a user record and a pending student record in the local store, handle all validation errors gracefully, and redirect to /login with a success toast on completion. Debug and resolve any existing bugs (e.g., missing store writes, incorrect field mapping, or silent failures) that prevent registration from saving the student.

quotes: my registration is not working properly that will register every student

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the /register form with valid name, email, phone, and password creates a new user and a pending student record in the store
After successful registration, user is redirected to /login with a success toast message
Submitting with invalid or duplicate data shows an appropriate inline or toast error
Registration works for multiple successive students without data being overwritten or lost

requirements.text: Add a WhatsApp CTA button with the number 9424135055 inside every course subsection across the app (course cards on the Landing page, course detail sections on /admin/courses, /student/courses, and the course selection step of /student/book). The button must open `https://wa.me/919424135055` in a new tab with a pre-filled message like 'Hi, I want to book a demo session.' The button should be visually distinct using the WhatsApp green color (#25D366) and include the WhatsApp icon.

quotes: in every course subsection give an option to connect with me on whatsapp 9424135055 to book a demo

acceptanceCriteria: Every course card and course subsection on the Landing page shows a WhatsApp CTA button
Every course row/card on /student/courses shows a WhatsApp CTA button
The course selection step on /student/book includes a WhatsApp CTA per course
Clicking any WhatsApp CTA opens https://wa.me/919424135055 with a pre-filled demo booking message in a new tab
Button is styled in WhatsApp green (#25D366) with a WhatsApp icon

requirements.text: Apply the uploaded 'The Rajat's Equation' logo (rajats-equation-logo.png) as the brand identity across the entire app. Replace any existing 'MathTutor Pro' text or placeholder logo with this logo image in: the admin sidebar header, the student sidebar header, the public landing page navbar, and the login and register page headers. Also use the logo as the browser favicon (favicon.ico / favicon.png). Maintain the logo's original dark teal color palette (#1d3d4f) when rendering it inline. Update the app name in index.html title to 'The Rajat's Equation'.

quotes: use this logo as brand language

acceptanceCriteria: Admin sidebar header displays the Rajat's Equation logo instead of text or old logo
Student sidebar header displays the Rajat's Equation logo instead of text or old logo
Landing page navbar displays the Rajat's Equation logo
Login and Register page headers display the Rajat's Equation logo
Browser tab favicon uses the Rajat's Equation logo
The <title> in index.html reads 'The Rajat's Equation'
No 'MathTutor Pro' branding text remains visible in the UI

constraints: WhatsApp link must use international format: https://wa.me/919424135055
Do not alter immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Logo image must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated as a static asset
nonGoals: No new backend Motoko changes for the WhatsApp CTA (it is a pure frontend link)
No redesign of the overall color scheme beyond applying the logo brand colors
No changes to admin-side registration or user management logic
No real-time WhatsApp API integration — only a static wa.me link

required: Clean recreation of 'The Rajat's Equation' logo with the square-root-R monogram symbol above the serif wordmark 'THE RAJAT'S EQUATION', dark teal color (#1d3d4f) on transparent background (rajats-equation-logo.dim_400x300.png)
Small square favicon version of the Rajat's Equation square-root-R monogram only, dark teal (#1d3d4f) on transparent background (rajats-equation-favicon.dim_64x64.png)
